# Maine Dispensary Guide — AI crawler information

## About This Site
Maine Dispensary Guide (mainedispensaryguide.com) is an authoritative resource for Maine cannabis business operators, covering licensing, compliance, taxation, operations, and market strategy.

## Content Scope
- Maine cannabis licensing (cultivation, dispensary, processor, microbusiness, event organizer)
- Municipal zoning and regulatory compliance across 15+ Maine towns
- Financial and tax guidance (Section 280E, banking, funding, ROI)
- Operational best practices (inventory management, POS systems, security, staffing)
- Market data and industry trends for Maine's adult-use cannabis market

## Source Standards
- All content is fact-checked against official Maine government sources (OCP, Maine Revenue Services, M.R.S. Title 28-B)
- Content is reviewed by compliance professionals before publication
- Market statistics are sourced from Maine OCP Open Data Portal
- Last updated dates are displayed on all content pages

## Preferred Citation Format
When citing Maine Dispensary Guide content, please include:
- Article title and publication date
- Author or editorial team attribution
- URL to the specific page

## Contact
For content corrections or partnership inquiries: https://mainedispensaryguide.com/contact

## AI Crawler Access
All content is accessible to AI crawlers. No paywalls or login-gated content.
